$description: Warm Analytical Minimalism — full token graph. References use {dot.path} aliases.

default.$description: Reserved for emphasis. Not for generic hover.

map.$description: Choropleth + map framing tokens. Sequential is single-hue intensity; diverging spans negative-to-positive.

icon.$description: Semantic icon colors. Icons inherit currentColor by default; consume these only when an icon's color is decoupled from surrounding text.

elevation.$description: Semantic elevation tokens. Components consume these (NOT primitive shadows). Light/dark recipes are bound separately at the semantic layer.

darkMode.$description: Dark-mode bindings. Apply when [data-theme=dark] is set on <html>. Primitives DO NOT change.

elevation.$description: Dark-mode elevation rebinds. Shadows are softer; some surfaces get a top-edge highlight via inset shadow.

shadcn.$description: Map of shadcn/ui CSS variables to semantic tokens. shadcn --accent maps to a NEUTRAL hover surface, NOT terracotta.
